Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Alin]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Alin is a storyteller in Myria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Alin is tall, strong, vibrant, and has dark gold hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Alin possesses an aura of radiant confidence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 3''' — Alin has gold hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 3''' — Alin has a dirty cloth bandage on his head and is bleeding from his scalp.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Alin radiates sunlight and has hair that gleams like polished gold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Alin's power caused a flash of golden light that made the storm in front of Simon vanish.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Alin is the son of Torin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Alin possesses Traveler powers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Alin can shroud his hands in misty white-gold light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Alin can manifest a translucent sword of light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Alin was born in Myria village.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Alin is an Elysian Traveler who has been in Myria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Alin has had a crush on Leah since she arrived in the village.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 5''' — Alin is Torin's son and a person capable of taking care of people at the capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 6''' — Alin is a person to whom things might be left if Kai leaves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Simon is waiting for Alin to do something.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 10''' — Alin is someone Simon hopes can save the people of Myria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — Alin has taken the hero business too closely to heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Alin has a second cousin who is a young man from Myria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — Alin is a person Simon's village members compare him to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — Alin is considering traveling through Naraka.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — Alin is referred to by the title Eliadel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — Alin is described as a Rising Sun.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — Alin is a poor liar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — Alin can access the gold light of Elysia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — Alin can manifest a golden sword of pure, translucent light from Elysia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — Alin can wrench a bolt of light from Elysia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Alin is wearing fine clothes that have been through a forest of thorns and a house fire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Alin is a leader or spokesperson for the Myrians.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Alin is part of a party from Myria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Alin can conjure a ball of golden light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Alin intends to go into the city to rescue Leah.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Alin orders Simon to take the people out of the city to keep them safe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Alin believes he and Simon are capable of things others are not.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — Alin is a Traveler who conjures a golden hound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 20''' — Alin's suit was torn and he had a patch of black ash over his heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 20''' — Alin radiates angelic light and has golden hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 20''' — Alin can blast streams of gold light from his palm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 20''' — Alin is a boy who had previously claimed he would fight Damasca.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 20''' — Alin's mind was separated from his body by Rhalia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 20''' — Alin uses Elysia and his Territory to reinforce a green shield.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 21''' — Alin can summon a broad-bladed sword of light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 21''' — Alin can open one Gate each day.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 21''' — Alin can only Travel from one end of Bel Calem to the other.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 22''' — Simon wants Alin to get to safety.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 23''' — Alin returned to Enosh covered in burns, scrapes, and bruises.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Alin took the mask from Overlord Malachi's shoulders as his head rolled across the floor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Alin needs Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Alin was recently injured and required bandages.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Alin was accompanied by Leah during his escape from Malachi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Alin defeated an Overlord named Malachi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Alin possesses the golden power of Elysia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Alin has huge Elysian bears.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Alin is giving a speech from a palace balcony.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Alin wears gold armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Alin sits at the head of the table under a gold banner featuring a winged sword, point-down, against a rising sun.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Alin questioned the purpose of aiding the escaped Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Alin lent Simon a filiar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Alin arrived after Simon spoke with Malachi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 8''' — Alin has sisters who were butchered by an insanely powerful creature.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Alin is known by the name Eliadel, which means 'The Rising Sun' in an ancient language.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Alin is a character who accompanied Grandmaster Naraka and Gilad to Simon's room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Alin possesses a globe of Elysian light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Alin is focused on getting results.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Alin can gather bright golden force between his palms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Alin can reach out to Elysia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — Alin can summon a green shield from Elysia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — Alin can open a Gate and retreat to his Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — Alin can summon a golden sword made of interlocking planes of light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — Alin is traveling through the city of Elysia with Rhalia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — Alin is able to open doors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — Alin craved the light and wanted recognition from Leah.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Alin works for Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Alin is a character who was involved in an operation to destroy the Hanging Tree.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Alin is a person who works for Grandmasters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — Alin is present during the negotiation with Talos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — Alin sat and said little while processing the situation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — Alin can summon rose light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Alin wore armor that was heavy and hot.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Alin was on the verge of stepping into Ragnarus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Alin shook off Grandmaster Naraka and jogged through the trees.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Alin can summon a globe of gold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Alin can throw up two walls of intersecting green plates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Alin is observing the battle between King Zakareth and the Enosh Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Alin used a translucent green light to catch the King's spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Alin fired a blast of golden light from his off hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Alin used a green wall to recover during combat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Alin can summon beings from the Gold District.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Alin is curious about the price King Zakareth paid for his strength.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Alin summons a sword of golden light to kill Zakareth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Alin guessed the staircase was usually hidden underneath a secret panel in the tile.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Alin stepped out of the Naraka Gate into Myria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Alin returned from Myria feeling weary.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Alin has a Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Alin can summon golden power from his Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Alin possesses a golden sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Alin used a cushion of orange light to catch Tamara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Alin can summon rose-pink light to heal injuries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Alin can manifest a green shield of interlocking plates ten layers thick.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Alin's body was filled with power by blood-red light swirling around his limbs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Alin used red light to gain superhuman strength and struck the Incarnation in the jaw.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Alin can soar on wings of orange light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Alin's body can burst into flames.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Alin can summon an instinctive shield of green.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Alin can summon orange light to stop in midair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Alin can sense things with silver light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Alin can summon an orb of liquid blue light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Alin can call a meteor of golden power from the sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Alin can lift into the air on sunset wings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 25''' — Alin's eyes are made of shifting slices of color.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 25''' — Alin is an Incarnation.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — Alin is believed by Simon to be an Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 5''' — Alin is the Elysian Incarnation and son of Torin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — Simon needs to figure something out regarding Alin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — Alin is a person Simon thinks about.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — Alin is an Incarnation who has begun to reshape the world around him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — Alin practically locks down the city at night.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — Alin possesses a radiant presence that can transform objects into new forms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — Alin claims to be Elysia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — Alin is a character capable of sculpting flower blossoms out of bright pink light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — Alin meditated on his own virtue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — Alin flew back over the city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Simon has promised to personally put a stop to Alin if he lets the Elysian Incarnation take too much control.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Alin is an Incarnation of Elysia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Alin has been reconstructing the city of Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Alin killed Grandmaster Tartarus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Alin is described as a walking natural disaster compared to the rest of the Incarnations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Alin walked through the doors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Alin experiences the suffering of his body in a distant way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Alin can summon Blue Light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Alin can use Green Light to form a shell of six-sided plates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Breaking Alin's Green armor causes him a piercing headache and painful mental feedback that can disable him for a few seconds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Alin can use Violet Light to attempt to banish objects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Alin can use Orange Light to create a bubble that lifts objects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — Alin is levitating to his feet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — Alin can use the Incarnation of Elysia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — Alin possesses Rose Light which can close wounds almost instantly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 13''' — Alin was from Myria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 13''' — Alin had rainbow-colored eyes that shifted and changed when he was alive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 13''' — Alin's body can rise like a puppet pulled by invisible strings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 13''' — Alin has rainbow eyes that can freeze mid-swirl.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 13''' — Alin's eyes can change to a blazing gold color.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 13''' — Alin can fill a street with a river of white-hot light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Alin's eyes changed from gold to luminescent violet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Alin holds the Lightning Spear in his right hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — Alin is an Incarnation who has been described as powerful and all-but-immortal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — Alin is no longer considered a Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Alin wears a mask.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Simon has been feeling a sense of doom since his fight with Alin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Alin is capable of carrying on intelligible conversations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Alin might be able to send bears to Leah's group.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Alin may be able to call up the City's whole army.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Alin felt fury pounding in his heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Alin's skin is a shade paler than it had ever been.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Alin and Simon working together have the best chance of finishing off an Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Alin provides information about the house in the Violet District that can hide people from Lirial scouts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Alin hovers over the city glowing with red and orange light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Alin fought side-by-side with Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Alin gave up his humanity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Shai appears to be using one of Alin's powers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 28''' — Alin is on the Elysian fields.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 28''' — Alin's eyes look like rainbows.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
